source_pr.title: *: drop stats v1 tests
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #63579

Problem Summary:
- Remove stats analyze v1 test coverage ahead of dropping the v1 write path, keeping v2-only expectations.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Removed v1-only analyze/stats tests and branches.
- Converted shared coverage to v2 and updated expectations/testdata.
- Updated integration tests/results for analyzer and indexmerge paths.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Tests**
  * Defaulted tests to analyze version 2, removed legacy v1/Next‑Gen gating, activated previously skipped scenarios, renamed/removed some test cases, and updated expectations to reflect V2 statistics, analyze, and auto‑analyze behavior.
* **Chores**
  * Removed obsolete test-only imports/dependencies, reduced test shard counts, and simplified legacy conditional logic and fixtures.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

symptoms: // Increase MaxRegionSampleSize to ensure all samples are collected for building histogram, otherwise the test will be unstable.

analysis:
PR title: *: drop stats v1 tests
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/66715
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: // Increase MaxRegionSampleSize to ensure all samples are collected for building histogram, otherwise the test will be unstable.
Changed files (43): pkg/executor/show_stats_test.go, pkg/executor/test/analyzetest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/analyzetest/analyze_test.go, pkg/executor/test/analyzetest/options/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/analyzetest/options/analyze_saved_options_test.go, pkg/planner/cardinality/BUILD.bazel, pkg/planner/cardinality/selectivity_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/cbotest/cbo_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/cbotest/testdata/analyze_suite_out.json, pkg/planner/core/casetest/cbotest/testdata/analyze_suite_xut.json ...
Diff highlights (excerpt):
- // Increase MaxRegionSampleSize to ensure all samples are collected for building histogram, otherwise the test will be unstable.
- // Default RPC encoding may cause statistics explain result differ and then the test unstable.
- "└─IndexRangeScan 512.00 cop[tikv] table:t, index:a(a) range:[1,1], keep order:false"))
- "└─IndexRangeScan 1.25 cop[tikv] table:t, index:a(a) range:[999,999], keep order:false"))
- "└─IndexRangeScan 1.00 cop[tikv] table:t, index:a(a) range:[1,1], keep order:false"))
- "├─IndexRangeScan(Build) 12.50 cop[tikv] table:t, index:ab(a, b) range:[5,5], keep order:false, stats:partial[ab:unInitialized, ac:unInitialized]",
- "  └─TableRowIDScan 12.50 cop[tikv] table:t keep order:false, stats:partial[ab:unInitialized, ac:unInitialized]"
- "├─IndexRangeScan(Build) 1.25 cop[tikv] table:t, index:ab(a, b) range:[5,5], keep order:false, stats:partial[ab:unInitialized, ac:unInitialized]",
Full patch analyzed; see patch_url.
